concept.description: Annotates SaltMarcher production types with stable report metadata for relay-only role analysis.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR type.fqn =~ 'src\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName SET type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN sourceFileName = '' OR type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + sourceFileName END RETURN type AS IndirectionProductionType

concept.description: Labels the focused SaltMarcher relay-sensitive role families and records whether each role is intentionally thin.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType) WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments, CASE WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.application\\..*UseCase(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.service\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_SERVICE' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.policy\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_POLICY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+\\.factory\\..*' THEN 'DOMAIN_FACTORY' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+Binder(\\$.*)?' THEN 'VIEW_BINDER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+IntentHandler(\\$.*)?' THEN 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER' WHEN type.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ServiceContribution(\\$.*)?' THEN 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ELSE null END AS roleKind WHERE roleKind IS NOT NULL SET type:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleType, type.roleKind = roleKind, type.thinRole = roleKind IN [ 'DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE', 'VIEW_BINDER', 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER', 'DATA_SERVICE_CONTRIBUTION' ], type.roleScope = CASE WHEN roleKind IN ['DOMAIN_APPLICATION_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_USE_CASE'] THEN 'domain:' + segments[2] WHEN roleKind IN ['DOMAIN_SERVICE', 'DOMAIN_POLICY', 'DOMAIN_FACTORY'] THEN 'domain:' + segments[2] + ':' + segments[3] WHEN roleKind IN ['VIEW_BINDER', 'VIEW_INTENT_HANDLER'] THEN 'view:' + segments[2] + ':' + segments[3] ELSE 'data:' + segments[2] END RETURN type AS LayeringIndirectionRoleType

concept.description: Labels concrete methods declared by the relay-sensitive role families.
concept.cypher: MATCH (owner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleType)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method) WHERE NOT method:Java:Method:Constructor AND method.synthetic IS NULL AND method.abstract IS NULL SET method:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleMethod, method.ownerRelativePath = owner.relativePath RETURN method AS LayeringIndirectionRoleMethod

concept.description: Labels relay-only role types whose concrete methods all funnel through owner-local helper chains into exactly one foreign production owner without reading or writing owner fields.
concept.cypher: MATCH (owner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleType) CALL { WITH owner MATCH (owner)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleMethod) CALL { WITH owner, method OPTIONAL MATCH (method)-[:READS|WRITES]->(field:Java:Field)<-[:DECLARES]-(owner) WITH owner, method, count(DISTINCT field) AS ownedFieldAccessCount OPTIONAL MATCH path = (method)-[:INVOKES|VIRTUAL_INVOKES*1..5]->(targetMethod:Java:Method)<-[:DECLARES]-(targetOwner:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType) WHERE targetOwner <> owner AND all(intermediateMethod IN nodes(path)[0..size(nodes(path)) - 2] WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (owner)-[:DECLARES]->(intermediateMethod) }) WITH method, ownedFieldAccessCount, collect(DISTINCT targetOwner.fqn) AS foreignTargetOwners RETURN method.signature AS signature, ownedFieldAccessCount AS ownedFieldAccessCount, foreignTargetOwners AS foreignTargetOwners } RETURN collect({ signature: signature, ownedFieldAccessCount: ownedFieldAccessCount, foreignTargetOwners: foreignTargetOwners }) AS methodSummaries } WITH owner, methodSummaries WHERE size(methodSummaries) > 0 AND all(summary IN methodSummaries WHERE summary.ownedFieldAccessCount = 0 AND size(summary.foreignTargetOwners) = 1 ) UNWIND methodSummaries AS summary UNWIND summary.foreignTargetOwners AS foreignTargetOwner WITH owner, methodSummaries, collect(DISTINCT foreignTargetOwner) AS distinctForeignTargets WHERE size(distinctForeignTargets) = 1 SET owner:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType, owner.relayTargetFqn = head(distinctForeignTargets), owner.relayMethodCount = size(methodSummaries) RETURN owner AS RelayOnlyRoleType

concept.description: Creates a stable relay edge from a relay-only role to its unique foreign production owner.
concept.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType) MATCH (target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType) WHERE target.fqn = source.relayTargetFqn MERGE (source)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target) RETURN source AS RelayOnlyRoleDependencySource, target AS RelayOnlyRoleDependencyTarget

constraint.description: Substantive non-thin role families must not collapse into relay-only wrappers, even when the relay is spread across owner-local helper methods.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType) WHERE coalesce(source.thinRole, false) = false MATCH (source)-[:DECLARES]->(method:Java:Method:SaltMarcher:LayeringIndirectionRoleMethod) RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS RelayTarget, count(DISTINCT method) AS RelayMethodCount, 'substantive tactical roles must own real domain behavior instead of owner-local helper chains that still collapse into one foreign owner' AS ExpectedOwnership, source.fqn + ' funnels all concrete methods into ' + target.fqn AS ActualOwnership, 'Delete the wrapper, merge the role into the target owner, or add real policy/construction behavior that breaks the single-target relay shape.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, RelayTarget

constraint.description: Thin roles that relay into a deeper relay chain are reported for review without becoming a blocker.
constraint.cypher: MATCH path = (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:RelayOnlyRoleType)-[:RELAYS_TO*2..5]->(terminal:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:IndirectionProductionType) WHERE coalesce(source.thinRole, false) = true WITH source, terminal, length(path) AS relayDepth ORDER BY source.relativePath, relayDepth, terminal.fqn WITH source, collect({ relayDepth: relayDepth, terminalTarget: coalesce(terminal.relativePath, terminal.fqn) })[0] AS firstHit RETURN source.relativePath AS Source, source.roleKind AS Role, firstHit.relayDepth AS RelayDepth, firstHit.terminalTarget AS TerminalTarget, 'thin roles may stay narrow, but review whether the relay stack still buys a real boundary once it extends beyond one hop' AS ExpectedReview, source.fqn + ' starts a relay stack with depth ' + toString(firstHit.relayDepth) AS ActualReview, 'Review whether the chain should collapse, move ownership downward, or stay documented as an intentional thin seam.' AS Details ORDER BY Source
